---
name: New event type request
about: Request support for a new AWS event source
title: '[EVENT TYPE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Event source**
Which AWS service triggers this event? (e.g., EventBridge, Cognito)

**Event class**
What is the class in `aws-lambda-java-events` that represents this event?

**Sample event JSON**
Paste a sample event JSON payload. This will be used to add detection logic and a test fixture.

**AWS documentation link**
Link to the AWS docs for this event format.
